title: MikuCoin (Discontinued)
description: A blue coin Economy with Estrogen
body:
Go download [MikuCoin: Reprinted](https://modrinth.com/mod/mikucoin-reprinted) and [MikuCoin: Misprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/mikucoin-misprint)


A blue coin can be used as an economic system. You can even print your own fake money. There is also estrogen, which comes with a dash move, and even cherries.

- Estrogen
- Testosterone
- Cherries
- Money 
- "Money" 
- B̸̭͗̾l̵̜̯̐ô̵̢͎̏o̷̭̽d̶̼̍ ̷̼̔̃M̶͖̥͂o̸͉͍̎͌n̷̠͕͋͝e̸̢̝͊̀y̶̨̥͘
- Banker
- Cat Potion
- Collar
- Codebreaker
- Null Dimension
- Debug Miku
- VPN Effect
- Runes

Discord Server:[Mochi Stand](https://discord.gg/ucPuFgNd4X)
Miku Model Maker:[PirateSee](https://github.com/PirateSee)
